archetype: Archetype 2 (Performance Pro) mixed with Archetype 5 (Jewel & Luxury)
vibe: Premium, competitive, modern, authoritative, stadium night. NOT betting.

scale.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl tracking-tighter font-black text-white
scale.h2: text-3xl md:text-4xl lg:text-5xl tracking-tight font-bold text-white

buttons.primary: bg-[#00E55A] text-[#0B0D12] font-bold rounded-full px-8 py-4 hover:bg-[#00C24B] transition-colors inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[rgba(255,255,255,0.2)] text-white font-semibold rounded-full px-8 py-4 hover:bg-[rgba(255,255,255,0.05)] transition-colors inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2

cards.style: bg-[#161A22] border border-[rgba(255,255,255,0.05)] rounded-2xl p-8 hover:-translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-300 shadow-2xl relative overflow-hidden

media_and_images.description: Stadium night scene used as full-cover background for the hero section with a dark overlay to ensure text readability.
Friends celebrating a match together. Used in the Private Leagues Spotlight section to highlight the 'sfida i tuoi amici' aspect.
Abstract soccer/neon texture, can be used lightly layered as a background element to break the solid dark background in specific sections.

sections_blueprint.name: Header
sections_blueprint.content: Sticky crystal glass nav (z-50). Logo on left. Navigation links (Come Funziona, Modalità, FAQ) center. CTA 'Scarica l'App' on right.

sections_blueprint.name: Hero
sections_blueprint.content: Overlay hero image with bg-black/60. Headline: 'Il gioco dei pronostici dove sfidi davvero i tuoi amici.' Subheading: 'Crea la tua lega. Domina la classifica. Il calcio è iniziato. Tocca a te vincere.' Dual CTA: 'Crea la tua Lega' (Primary) and 'Scopri come' (Secondary).

sections_blueprint.name: How It Works (Come Funziona)
sections_blueprint.content: 3-step visual flow: 1. Crea/entra in una lega, 2. Inserisci pronostici prima del kickoff, 3. Vinci punti e scala la classifica. Use large faint numbers (text-8xl text-white/5) floating behind the text.

sections_blueprint.name: Game Modes (3 Modalità)
sections_blueprint.content: Bento Grid or 3-column Layout. 1) Tutti Contro Tutti (vince chi fa più punti). 2) Lega Campionato (1vs1 ogni giornata, 3pt/1pt/0pt). 3) Tornei (gironi + eliminazione diretta per eventi big). Include premium icons per card.

sections_blueprint.name: Private Leagues Spotlight (Focus)
sections_blueprint.content: Split layout section. High-impact image of 'friends_celebrating' on one side. Strong commercial headline: 'Crea la tua lega privata e sfida i tuoi amici'. Emphasize the invite code mechanic. This is the growth engine.

sections_blueprint.name: Prediction Markets
sections_blueprint.content: Technical UI representation of markets (1X2, Goal/No Goal, Over/Under, Risultato esatto). Use a mock app interface component or clean tech widgets, NOT neon casino betting buttons.

sections_blueprint.name: FAQ & Rules
sections_blueprint.content: Use Shadcn Accordion component for 'Regolamento' and 'FAQ'. Neutral dark card background for answers to maintain authoritative tone.

sections_blueprint.name: Newsletter & Footer
sections_blueprint.content: Contact form (email input + 'Iscriviti' button). Language switcher (IT/EN/ES). App Store/Play Store placeholder badges. Social media links.

technical_instructions.icons: Use lucide-react (already installed). Make them scalable and styled with the accent color where necessary.
technical_instructions.testing: MANDATORY: All buttons, form inputs, links, and major section containers must have `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid='hero-cta-create'`).
technical_instructions.responsiveness: Mobile-first approach. Ensure grids stack to 1 column on mobile. Pad sections properly.
technical_instructions.animations: Use framer-motion for smooth entrance animations (fade up). Buttons should have scale/hover transitions.
technical_instructions.styling: Utilize Tailwind CSS for all styling. Overwrite Shadcn default UI styling (like generic white borders) to match the premium dark theme (subtle white/10 borders). NO default violet/purple colors.
technical_instructions.fonts: Include the Google Fonts link for 'Clash Display' (or substitute with a bold modern geometric sans if Clash isn't in Google Fonts natively, e.g. 'Outfit' or 'Space Grotesk' but 'Clash Display' via CDN is preferred) and 'Manrope' in index.html.
